text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Oguri Cap has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey, I have an idea. Let's go to a hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, a hot spring. Come on, get ready.
choice_data_list: At least give me an explanation first.
At least give me an explanation first.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I just think this is the perfect time to go for a
nice, relaxing bath.
choice_data_list: That's not what I mean. Why do you want me to join you?
That's not what I mean. Why do you want me to join you?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's easy. I just wanna go together with you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ever since my debut, we've done nothing but run.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But now that things have calmed down a little, I
wanna take you to a hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hot springs are the best. They soothe your body
and soul. And most importantly, they feel great.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I want us both to experience that comfort
together...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Do you not want to come?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Glad to hear it. Then it's decided!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh? What coupon?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh right! The one in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
A friend, huh? I wonder who'd wanna join me at a
hot spring. Who to ask, who to ask?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do you think you can hold on to this coupon
for a while?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. I totally forgot about that! I guess
having you hold on to it was the right choice.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
After all, you're the person I really wanted to go
with in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All right then! Let's go for a relaxing soak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Phew... The water was great!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The way the hot water felt on my skin was perfect.
This hot spring was so relaxing...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad I was able to come here with you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I got caught up in my own excitement.
Were you able to relax too?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Good... Hehe, that makes me feel even warmer!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So, what should we do next?
choice_data_list:
How about dinner? I'm sure you've been looking
forward to it.

How about dinner? I'm sure you've been looking
forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
M-maybe I have... But there's actually something
else I've been looking forward to.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wanna go for a quick stroll outside?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Wow! The stars are really pretty. They're so...
incredibly beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Take a look for yourself. Ah, I guess I didn't have
to tell you, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I heard the stars were pretty out here, so I was
looking forward to taking a walk with you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
We've been so focused on our goals that we
haven't even had a chance to look at the sky
together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Still... It's weird. Even now, we're looking in the
same direction.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's one thing I can't see changing. I hope we
can both keep experiencing the same sights
together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I'd really like that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Can I ask you something?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm always a little slow at getting my point across,
so do you mind if we take our time on this walk?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Oguri Cap and I continue our stroll
beneath the stars and chat for long as the night
allows.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Oguri Cap and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
